title: Two big bird-like UFOs spotted in Belo Horizonte-MG moving in circles [1997]
excerpt: MARCH 28th, 1997. Time: 00h:25am. Duration: 30 minutes. In Delfim Moreira neighborhood, in Belo Horizonte, State of Minas Gerais, nine people spotted, with the naked eye, two unidentified flying objects moving fast at an altitude of approximately 500 meters. text_preview: MARCH 28th, 1997. Time: 00h:25am. Duration: 30 minutes. In Delfim Moreira neighborhood, in Belo Horizonte, State of Minas Gerais, nine people spotted, with the naked eye, two unidentified flying objects moving fast at an altitude of approximately 500 meters. According to the witnesses, the UFOs were shaped like “a bird”. One of them was large and the other one small. The large UFO was positioned in front of the small UFO and both were white in color and performed circular movements. summary: Nine witnesses in Belo Horizonte's Delfim Moreira neighborhood spotted two white bird-shaped UFOs performing circular movements at 500m altitude for 30 minutes on March 28, 1997.
